meanings.usage: 指修道士、僧侣居住和进行宗教活动的场所
指山脉中可供通行的狭窄通道
表示从一个地方移动到另一个地方的动作
常用搭配connect A to/with B，表示把A和B连接起来
为及物动词，通常表示创立组织、机构等，过去式和过去分词为founded
指长途旅行的人，美式拼写为traveler
既可以指看门的犬只，也可比喻监督公共事务的个人或组织
指在山体、地下或海底开凿的通道
用来修饰动词，表示做事情没有经过慎重考虑
常用搭配attempt to do sth，表示努力做有难度的事
常用搭配make an attempt to do sth
指用栅栏、围墙等围起来的区域
表示天气或物体的冷热程度，常用搭配take one's temperature指量体温
指男性修行者，对应女性修行者为nun（修女）
表示不受他人打扰的私人空间或状态
表示没有固定方向地随意行走
指进行滑雪运动的人，动词形式为ski

phrases.usage: 引导原因状语从句，意为“既然；由于”，表示已知的事实或新出现的情况

examples.en: Now that a tunnel has been built through the mountains, the Pass is less dangerous.
examples.zh: 由于已经修建了一条穿山隧道，山口现在不那么危险了。

examples.en: Now that you have finished your homework, you can watch TV for a while.
examples.zh: 既然你已经做完了作业，你可以看一会儿电视。

phrases.usage: 动词短语，意为“派出；发出”，可接人或物作宾语

examples.en: The dogs are still sent out into the snow whenever a traveller is in difficulty.
examples.zh: 每当有旅行者遇到困难时，这些狗仍然会被派到雪地里去。

examples.en: The rescue team sent out three groups to search for the missing climber.
examples.zh: 救援队派出了三个小组搜寻失踪的登山者。

phrases.usage: 介词短语，意为“处于困境中”，在句中可作表语或后置定语

examples.en: We should give a hand to those who are in difficulty.
examples.zh: 我们应该帮助那些身处困境的人。

phrases.usage: 介词，意为“尽管；虽然”，后接名词、代词或动名词，引导让步关系

examples.en: Despite the new tunnel, there are still a few people who rashly attempt to cross the Pass on foot.
examples.zh: 尽管有了新隧道，仍然有少数人鲁莽地试图步行穿越山口。

examples.en: Despite the bad weather, we still held the sports meeting as planned.
examples.zh: 尽管天气不好，我们仍然按计划举办了运动会。

phrases.usage: 动词搭配，意为“试图做某事；尝试做某事”，常指做有难度或风险的事

examples.en: Very few people attempt to cross the Pass in winter.
examples.zh: 冬天很少有人试图穿越山口。

examples.en: He attempted to climb the mountain alone, but failed due to the storm.
examples.zh: 他试图独自攀登那座山，但因为暴风雨失败了。

phrases.usage: 动词搭配，意为“比起B更喜欢A”，用于表达两者间的偏好

examples.en: The monks prefer winter to summer for they have more privacy.
examples.zh: 修道士们喜欢冬天胜过夏天，因为他们有更多的独处时间。

examples.en: I prefer coffee to tea when I need to stay up late working.
examples.zh: 我需要熬夜工作的时候，比起茶更喜欢喝咖啡。

phrases.usage: 被动语态搭配，意为“被允许做某事”，表示得到许可做某件事

examples.en: The dogs are allowed to wander outside their enclosure in winter.
examples.zh: 冬天狗被允许在围场外面闲逛。

examples.en: Students are not allowed to use mobile phones in class in most schools.
examples.zh: 大多数学校不允许学生在课堂上使用手机。

phrases.usage: 固定搭配，意为“受到热烈欢迎”

examples.en: These young people always receive a warm welcome at St.Bernard's monastery.
examples.zh: 这些年轻人在圣伯纳德修道院总是受到热烈欢迎。

examples.en: The foreign visitors received a warm welcome when they arrived at the university.
examples.zh: 外国访客抵达这所大学时受到了热烈欢迎。

grammar.title: 非限制性定语从句
grammar.definition: 对先行词进行补充说明，去掉之后不影响主句意思的完整性，和主句之间通常用逗号隔开
grammar.usage: which指代物，who指代人，在从句中作主语或宾语，不能用that引导

examples.en: The famous monastery of St.Bernard, which was founded in the eleventh century, lies about a mile away.
examples.zh: 著名的圣伯纳德修道院建于11世纪，位于（离山口）约一英里远的地方。

examples.en: These friendly dogs, which were first brought from Asia, were used as watchdogs even in Roman times.
examples.zh: 这些友善的狗最初是从亚洲引进的，甚至在罗马时期就被用作看门狗。

examples.en: My elder sister, who works in Shanghai, will come back home next week.
examples.zh: 我姐姐在上海工作，她下周会回家。

grammar.title: 原因状语从句引导词for的用法
grammar.definition: for是并列连词，用来补充说明前一句内容的原因，语气比because弱，不能放在句首
grammar.structure: 主句 + for + 原因分句
grammar.usage: 通常用于书面语，对前面的事实进行解释说明，前后两个分句是并列关系

examples.en: During the summer months, the monastery is very busy, for it is visited by thousands of people who cross the Pass in cars.
examples.zh: 夏天的几个月里，修道院十分忙碌，因为有成千上万开车穿越山口的人来这里参观。

examples.en: The dogs have greater freedom, too, for they are allowed to wander outside their enclosure.
examples.zh: 狗也有更多的自由，因为它们被允许在围场外面闲逛。

examples.en: He stayed up late last night, for he had to finish his report before the deadline.
examples.zh: 他昨晚熬夜了，因为他得在截止日期前完成报告。

sentencePatterns.pattern: At + 具体高度/年龄/价格, it is + 最高级 + 范围

original.en: At 2,473 metres, it is the highest mountain pass in Europe.
original.zh: 它海拔2473米，是欧洲最高的山口。

imitations.en: At 8,848 metres, Mount Qomolangma is the highest mountain in the world.
imitations.zh: 珠穆朗玛峰海拔8848米，是世界上最高的山峰。

imitations.en: At 14 years old, he is the youngest player in the national football team.
imitations.zh: 他14岁，是国家足球队里最年轻的球员。

sentencePatterns.pattern: For + 时间段, sth/sb have done sth

original.en: For hundreds of years, St.Bernard dogs have saved the lives of travellers crossing the dangerous Pass.
original.zh: 数百年来，圣伯纳德狗拯救了穿越危险山口的旅行者的生命。

imitations.en: For thousands of years, Chinese people have created splendid traditional culture.
imitations.zh: 数千年来，中国人民创造了灿烂的传统文化。

imitations.en: For nearly 10 years, this little library has provided free books for children in the village.
imitations.zh: 近十年来，这个小图书馆一直为村里的孩子提供免费书籍。

sentencePatterns.pattern: In winter/In summer, however, life + 地点 + is quite different.

original.en: In winter, however, life at the monastery is quite different.
original.zh: 然而到了冬天，修道院的生活就完全不同了。

imitations.en: In summer, however, life in this small coastal town is quite different.
imitations.zh: 然而到了夏天，这个海滨小镇的生活就完全不同了。

imitations.en: On weekends, however, life in the office building is quite different.
imitations.zh: 然而到了周末，这座办公楼里的生活就完全不同了。
